gt_sql: SELECT T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.GLU > 180 ORDER BY T1.Birthday ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql: SELECT MIN(Patient.Birthday) AS Birthday FROM Patient JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID WHERE Laboratory.GLU IS NOT NULL AND Laboratory.GLU > 180;
question: When is the birthday of the oldest patient whose blood glucose is abnormal?
